title: Using a dynamic delay causes an assertion fail

features.name: time variable used as delay expression in continuous assignment
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment with a time variable used as the delay expression

features.name: dual delay format with dynamic delay expression
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment using both rise and fall delays where at least one is a dynamic expression

features.name: procedural assignment to delay variable in always block
features.description: Code should include a time variable declared at module level that receives assignment in an always block, then used as delay in continuous assignment
